summary: Notable for: paternal early CHD (father's MI at 68), maternal CVA, one brother's lung cancer (heavy smoker, Vietnam), maternal-side type 2 diabetes (mother, surviving brother). No known family history of inherited cancer syndromes; no breast/ovarian aggregation; no autoimmune disease aggregation. Husband had significant CHD.

geneticTesting.notes: Patient has not undergone formal genetic counseling. Sister's breast cancer + brother's lung cancer have not prompted formal cancer genetics referral; patient has not asked about it.
